generated_oml:
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot used for machining tasks with working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors, PositionSensors
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current I_M input and torque τ_M output"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the robot axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for motion transmission"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularPositionMotorDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularPositionGearboxDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current to the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensors for measuring angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularPositionMotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance AngularPositionGearboxDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensors
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from motor current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AngularPositionMotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionMotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance AngularPositionGearboxData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox angular position data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionGearboxDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from current and motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionMotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction model outputs for deviation analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionMotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for robot axis structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for robot axis internal structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling and structural analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation and friction model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset management and data integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard for visualization of sensor and simulation data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard visualization of sensor and simulation data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics enabling control parameter updates for improved motion accuracy, derived from deviation analysis between simulated and measured data"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control parameter updates for improved motion accuracy based on friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of sensor and simulation data for monitoring"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with continuous updates during robot operation for friction model identification and motion control adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integrated system comprising SysML models, Simulink simulations, AAS, MQTT data streaming, and a unified dashboard for visualizing measured and simulated data traces to support friction model identification."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, continuously updated during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and varying operational conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data for friction models, with white-box and black-box models evaluated against real-time operational data to identify deviations and improve motion accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from the physical robot to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Industrie 4.0 standards via Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for system modeling and data exchange."
]
